_comment: Probabilistic traffic-light model. For each listed lanelet, the cost matrix replaces the literal lanelet_penalties value with E[wait] computed from the cycle. BFMC cycle: green=5s, yellow=3s, red=3s, so E[wait] ≈ 1.636 s instead of the 5 s literal.

G._description: Traffic-light intersection (zone G in the BFMC course).

startline._description: Default start position 995 has a traffic light.
